description: Session intent policy - governs how the runtime game behavior adjusts based on who is driving the session.

human_player.description: A human is playing normally. The governor observes but does not execute mutations. Automation is disabled.

automation_script.description: A script or automation runner is driving. The governor runs the priority cascade but execution is gated behind bounded execution. Explicit commands via dev command bus are accepted.

ai_agent.description: An AI agent is driving autonomously. Full automation including bounded execution is permitted. All engines default to Automation mode.

ci_cd.description: CI/CD pipeline is driving. Aggressive proof collection. No human interactivity expected.

unknown.description: Unknown driver. Conservative defaults: all engines manual, observe only.

priorityEngineModes.conserve_resources: Minimum automation for survival (food, safety). Do not trade or travel.
priorityEngineModes.observe_only: Read state only. No mutations. Log observations.
priorityEngineModes.normal: Full priority cascade with bounded execution gating. Balance survival and profit.
priorityEngineModes.aggressive_proof: Maximize proof throughput. Acquire all three proof types (ordinary trade, horse, food) as fast as possible.

agentVisibilityRules.description: When the session intent file exists, other agents inspecting the repo can determine:
rules: drivenBy: who is controlling the game right now
sprint: what the active sprint is (prevents parallel conflicting sprints)
agentRole: which agent lane is active (A/B/C/D)
priorityEngineMode: how aggressive the automation can be
branch/comitSha: what code is being tested
